message:
feat(alerts): DND toggle in alerts card + quiet hours in settings (#8732)

Wires the useDoNotDisturb hook into the UI:

ActiveAlerts card header:
- Bell/BellOff toggle with dropdown: "For 1h", "For 4h",
  "Until tomorrow 8am", "Until I turn it off"
- When DND active: shows yellow BellOff icon with remaining time
  (e.g. "2h 15m"). Click to resume immediately.

Settings → Notifications:
- Quiet Hours section with enable toggle + time pickers
- Default: disabled. Suggested: 22:00–08:00.
- Persisted in localStorage via useDoNotDisturb hook.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,8 @@ import { useState } from 'react' import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next' -import { Globe, Check, X } from 'lucide-react' +import { Globe, Check, X, Moon } from 'lucide-react' import { isBrowserNotifVerified, setBrowserNotifVerified } from '../../../lib/notificationStatus' +import { useDoNotDisturb } from '../../../hooks/useDoNotDisturb' /** Browser notification verification flow state */ type BrowserNotifState = 'idle' | 'asked' | 'verified' | 'failed' @@ -176,6 +177,56 @@ export function BrowserNotificationSettings() { )} )} + + {/* Quiet Hours */} + + + ) +} + +/** Quiet hours configuration — recurring daily window where notifications are suppressed */ +function QuietHoursConfig() { + const dnd = useDoNotDisturb() + + return ( +
+
+ +

Quiet Hours

+
+

+ Suppress desktop notifications during a recurring daily window. +

+ + + + {dnd.quietHoursEnabled && ( +
+ dnd.setQuietHours(true, e.target.value)} + className="px-2 py-1 text-sm bg-secondary border border-border rounded text-foreground" + /> + and + dnd.setQuietHours(true, undefined, e.target.value)} + className="px-2 py-1 text-sm bg-secondary border border-border rounded text-foreground" + /> +
+ )}
) }
